name: Peachy Pork Steaks
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook steaks in hot oil over medium heat in a large skillet until lightly browned on both sides. Remove pan drippings.
2. Sprinkle steaks with salt, pepper, and basil.
3. Combine peach nectar, 1/2 cup water, vinegar, and bouillon cubes; pour over steaks. Simmer for 30 minutes or until steaks are tender.
4. Place steaks on a serving platter over rice and keep warm.
5. Mix cornstarch with cold water. Stir into the nectar mixture until thickened. Add parsley and stir.
6. Spoon half of the gravy over the steaks. Serve remaining gravy alongside the steaks.
